# Vendored Protocol Buffer definitions

This module contains the external Protocol Buffer definitions required to build
the project without downloading dependencies from the Buf Schema Registry.

| Files | Upstream module | Commit |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `buf/validate/validate.proto` | `buf.build/bufbuild/protovalidate` | `435963d1631043e694e56e6bcc3c79c3` |
| `google/api/annotations.proto`, `google/api/http.proto` | `buf.build/googleapis/googleapis` | `c17df5b2beca46928cc87d5656bd5343` |

The corresponding upstream licenses are stored next to the vendored sources.
